title: Planning your child's future? These 4 government-backed investment options can help you start early
summary: Parents can secure their child's financial future through various government-backed investment schemes. Options include the National Savings Certificate, Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana, Public Provident Fund, and NPS Vatsalya.&nbsp;

title: Global diversification: These mutual funds have the highest exposure to international stocks
summary: What if you could indirectly invest in global giants like Nvidia, Apple, and TSMC through the same SIP route you use for equity mutual funds? Let's find out the top 5 domestic equity funds in India that invest a significant portion of their portfolio in foreign stocks.&nbsp;

title: Bank holidays in June 2026: SBI, HDFC, and other lenders to remain shut for up to 11 days — Check RBI calendar
summary: Banks in India will close for several days in June due to holidays. Customers should check the RBI's holiday calendar for branch closures. Full list of holidays here.

title: While you avoid stocks, EPFO has doubled its equity investments in 7 years — Here's where your PF money goes
summary: EPF members benefit from government-backed returns and tax-free interest. EPFO invests their contributions in various assets, including 85% in debt and 15% in equities.

title: Watch: How a govt employee in Delhi saves ₹65,000 from a ₹90,000 salary every month
summary: A 28-year-old government employee from Delhi has gone viral after revealing that she spends only around ₹25,000 a month despite earning ₹90,000 in hand. From rent and groceries to fuel and shopping, her budget breakdown has sparked conversations online.

title: I asked ChatGPT to calculate how inflation affects growth of my ₹50 lakh investment—the answer was a wake-up call
summary: Inflation competes with compounding, affecting future purchasing power. A ₹50 lakh investment could grow to ₹4.82 crore in 20 years but would only have the purchasing power of ₹1.50 crore today with 6% inflation.

title: Hidden home loan charges borrowers must check before signing to avoid higher borrowing costs and financial stress
summary: Hidden home loan charges can quietly increase borrowing costs. Processing fees, stamp duty and insurance add to EMIs and affect long-term affordability, making expert financial advice essential before taking a fresh home loan.

title: Could you be sitting on forgotten money? Here's how to check using the new govt portal
summary: The Finance Ministry launched an online platform for tracking unclaimed financial assets, enhancing public awareness and access to information.&nbsp;

title: Man shares ₹1.3 lakh Europe itinerary covering Spain and Portugal in 13 days, Internet reacts
summary: A travel creator has gone viral after claiming he explored Spain and Portugal over 13 days for just ₹1.3 lakh. Sharing a detailed cost breakdown and itinerary on Instagram, he argued that Europe can be affordable with careful planning, though several users questioned whether numbers were realistic.

title: Gold, silver prices today, May 30: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: On 30 May, gold prices in India remained stable, with 24-karat gold priced at ₹156,810 per 10 grams. Silver prices also showed limited movement, with 999 Fine silver at ₹267,790 per kg.

title: F&O Talk: Nifty may stay range-bound; Sudeep Shah sees opportunities in banks, IT, picks 7 stocks
summary: Indian stock markets experienced a sharp selloff on Friday, with Sensex and Nifty dropping over 1%, driven by passive fund flows from MSCI index reshuffles. Volatility surged as the market lost Rs 6 lakh crore in capitalization. Analysts suggest caution amid indecisiveness and a lack of strong direc

title: Triveni Engineering Q4 profit falls to Rs 167.4 crore; FY26 profit rises 12.8%
summary: Triveni Engineering & Industries reported a consolidated net profit of Rs 167.4 crore for Q4 FY26, a decrease from Rs 187.1 crore in the prior year. title: Zara's India FY26 profit falls 32% to Rs 204 crore; revenue slips
summary: Zara's India profit saw a significant 31.9% drop to Rs 204.14 crore in FY26, with revenue also declining slightly. This comes as Trent Ltd reduced its stake in the joint venture operating Zara stores in India. Meanwhile, another JV, Massimo Dutti, reported revenue growth.

title: Shalibhadra Finance eyes Rs 500 crore AUM as FY26 profit climbs 22%
summary: Shalibhadra Finance is set for major expansion. The company aims to more than double its loan book by FY29. This growth will be fueled by new products like Micro LAP and home loans. Geographic expansion into new states is also planned. Technology investments will enhance efficiency. Shalibhadra Fina

title: NSE Social Stock Exchange gets CSR boost as MCA clears corporate funding route. Check details
summary: India's Social Stock Exchange receives a significant boost. Companies can now channel a portion of their Corporate Social Responsibility spending through this platform. This move aims to broaden funding for non-profit organizations. It also enhances transparency and accountability within the social

title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: Nifty stuck in consolidation zone; 23,800 remains key breakout hurdle
summary: Markets experienced volatility and ended the week with a modest loss, primarily due to MSCI rebalancing flows. Nifty consolidated within a range, with immediate resistance at 23,800 and support at 23,300-23,400. Traders are advised to maintain a selective approach and protect gains.

title: Bitcoin retreats to $73K, but ETF inflows and shrinking exchange reserves keep bulls hopeful
summary: Bitcoin dipped to $73,000 despite ETF inflows and shrinking exchange reserves, failing to maintain momentum after touching $83,000 in May. Ethereum also faced pressure, trading below $2,000. title: Sunil Singhania’s Abakkus Portfolio: 6 stocks rally up to 75% in CY26; 5 new buys added in Q4
summary: Sunil Singhania’s Abakkus Asset Manager portfolio rose 6% to Rs 2,742 crore in March 2026 quarter, with mixed CY26 performance showing strong gains in Avalon Technologies and Suven Life Sciences amid several notable stock declines.

title: FIIs pull out massive Rs 20,637 crore in single day on Friday. What led to this sharp exit?
summary: Foreign portfolio investors offloaded Indian equities worth a net Rs 20,637 crore on Friday, marking one of the sharpest single-day selloffs. This significant outflow coincided with the MSCI index rebalancing, leading to heightened trading volumes and prompting questions about the role of high-frequ

title: Concurrent Losers: 14 smallcap stocks decline for 5 consecutive sessions
summary: Amid broader market weakness, the Sensex fell 408 points over five sessions ending May 29, while 14 BSE smallcap stocks declined continuously, losing up to 15% led by Wakefit Innovations, Master Trust and Godavari Biorefineries.

title: Buy HDFC Bank; target of Rs 1,850: ICICI Securities
summary: ICICI Securities is bullish on HDFC Bank has recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 1,850 in its research report dated April 21, 2024.
